scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter crm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter crm exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: pnpm --filter crm exec prisma migrate reset --force && pnpm db:seed
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('apps/crm/prisma/schema.prisma')) require('child_process').execSync('pnpm --filter crm exec prisma generate', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
